title: Two International Publications from the Students of Department of Economics
content:
Two International Publications from the Students of Department of Economics

In collaboration with Asst. Prof. Hakkı Kutay Bolkol and Asst. Prof. Ece H. Güleryüz, scientific studies titled “HUMAN DEVELOPMENT AND ECONOMIC GROWTH IN TURKEY AND CHINA: AN EMPIRICAL ANALYSIS OF THE CAUSAL RELATIONSHIP” by Süleyman İminov and “ENERGY CONSUMPTION, CO2 EMISSION AND GDP PER CAPITA IN THE UNITED STATES: AN INVESTIGATION OF THE CAUSAL RELATIONSHIPS” by Barış Kılınç are published as a book Chapter in the book titled "Development Policies: Local Opportunities and Local Development" by Ekin International publishing house. In addition, the book's international library promotion is made by Berkeley Press. We congratulate our students and wish them success for their future work.
